column1: # Curated Extraction Eval — paper registry (the editable source of truth for the set).
# ADD A PAPER: append a row below (tab-separated), or run:
#   gene      target gene symbol, e.g. KCNH2. The paper's gold answer must be
#             discoverable for scoring: either it already has rows in
#             OR you supply rows in gold_overrides/<GENE>_recall_input.csv (use
#             this for problem papers / genes without a repo gold standard).
#   pmid      PubMed ID. Source must be cached at corpus/<GENE>/<PMID>/ (it will
#             be after any gvf-run that fetched it); build_fixture warns if not.
#   strategy  how the gold variants are encoded, so the set spans extraction
#   note      one line on why this paper is in the set (e.g. the failure mode it
#             guards against). Free text; do not use tabs.
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored. Order does not matter.
